description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic rectangular form with a slightly overhanging top and four sturdy, turned legs. The front is adorned with five drawers, two smaller ones at the top and three larger ones below, each fitted with ornate, vintage-style handles. The lower apron is gently curved and decorated with subtle carved detailing, adding a touch of elegance. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel showing two mounting brackets near the top edge. The finish is a uniform, muted gray, giving the piece a refined and understated appearance. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood, with metal hardware for the handles.
description: A classic gray chest of drawers with five drawers, ornate handles, and subtle carved detailing on the lower apron. The design is elegant and sturdy, with a smooth, uniform finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing five drawers with ornate handles and a carved lower apron.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat side panel and the profile of the overhanging top and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain back panel with two mounting brackets near the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and leg profile.
